name: Shopper can select a different delivery option
scenarioId: delivery_options:Shopper can select a different delivery option
methodName: Shopper can select a different delivery option

testSteps.description: Given the shopper has navigated to a product detail page

children.description: Shopper opens the browser at http://localhost:3001

testSteps.description: Then the delivery section should contain radio button options
When the shopper selects a different delivery option
Then a different delivery option should now be selected

userStory.narrative:
As an online shopper on Linea Supply
  I want to choose a delivery option for a product
  So that I can select the shipping method that suits me

title: Shopper can select a different delivery option
